anthropic.title: Anthropic Claude Configuration
anthropic.description: Enter your Anthropic API key from console.anthropic.com.

data_description.api_key: Your Anthropic API key (starts with sk-ant-...)

ollama.title: Ollama Configuration
ollama.description: Enter the URL where your Ollama instance is running.

data_description.ollama_host: URL where Ollama is running (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:11434)

ollama_model.title: Ollama Model Selection
ollama_model.description: Select a model from your Ollama instance.

data_description.model: Which model to use for AI responses

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check your API key, network, or Ollama host.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your Anthropic API key.

init.title: Voice Automation AI Options
init.description: Adjust runtime settings. Connection details can only be changed by re-adding the integration.

data_description.model: Which LLM model to use for responses
data_description.max_history_turns: Number of conversation turns to remember (1-50)
data_description.temperature: Controls randomness (0.0-2.0). Lower = more focused, higher = more creative. Leave empty for model default.
data_description.top_p: Nucleus sampling (0.0-1.0). Controls diversity of responses. Leave empty for model default.
